info.title: LegalDispatch Operations Service API
info.description:
Work order lifecycle management, agent assignment, dispatch, attempt tracking,
deliverables, document packaging, and review workflows for the LegalDispatch platform.

## Authentication Model
- **Ops portal endpoints** — `X-User-Claims` with ops role (forwarded by API Gateway)

## Response Format
All responses use **snake_case** JSON serialization. Error responses follow the
standard envelope: `{ "code": "CODE", "message": "...", "details": {...}, "request_id": "..." }`.

get.summary: List work orders with role-scoped filtering

post.summary: Create a work order on behalf of a source service

get.summary: Get work order detail with source service enrichment

patch.summary: Update work order urgency, deadline, or instructions

post.summary: Cancel a work order
Mark a work order as completed — triggers billing event
Close a work order after billing is settled
Claim a work order for the current ops user
Release claim on a work order
Assign an ops user to manage a work order
Override work order status with audit trail — requires reason
Assign a field worker to a work order
Reassign a work order to a different field worker
Unassign the current field worker from a work order

get.summary: Get assignment history for a work order

post.summary: Assign field workers to multiple work orders
Dispatch multiple work orders to their assigned field workers
Dispatch a work order to the assigned field worker
Log a field attempt from the ops portal

get.summary: List all field attempts for a work order

patch.summary: Amend a field attempt result or notes

get.summary: Search field workers with local assignment enrichment
Get worker detail with active assignment count

post.summary: Create a deliverable for a work order

get.summary: List all deliverables for a work order

patch.summary: Update a deliverable description or status

delete.summary: Delete a deliverable from a work order

post.summary: Review a deliverable — approve, reject, or request changes

get.summary: List all documents attached to a work order

post.summary: Add a document to a work order

put.summary: Save the document arrangement for bundle generation

delete.summary: Remove a document from a work order

post.summary: Preview the merged document bundle
Generate the final server packet (instruction sheet + bundle)

get.summary: Get the work order review queue

post.summary: Approve a work order in the review queue
Reject a work order in the review queue
Request changes on a work order in the review queue
Add an internal ops note to a work order

get.summary: List all internal ops notes for a work order

tags.name: Work Orders
